insights.observation: Your skip rate this week is 42%.
insights.context: Last week: 38% — you're getting more impatient.
insights.explanation: Skip rates often rise when your playlist mix goes stale. Rotating in new music tends to help.
insights.action: Run Playlist Janitor to find the tracks dragging your rate up.

insights.context: 35% higher skip rate than the rest of the day.
insights.explanation: Evening listening often happens on the go or while multitasking — you're quicker to skip songs that don't fit the mood.
insights.action: Try a focused, high-energy playlist to open your evening sessions.

insights.observation: Imagine Dragons is the artist you skip most often — 64% of the time.
insights.context: Taylor Swift and Ed Sheeran follow close behind.

insights.observation: You always listen to Harry Styles all the way through — 0% skip rate across 28 plays.
insights.context: That's your most loyal listening relationship.

insights_nb.context: Forrige uke: 38 % — du er mer utålmodig nå.
insights_nb.explanation: Skip-raten stiger ofte når spillelistene stagnerer. Å rotere inn ny musikk hjelper som regel.
insights_nb.action: Kjør Playlist Janitor for å finne sporene som drar opp raten din.

insights_nb.context: 35 % høyere skip-rate enn resten av dagen.
insights_nb.explanation: Kveldsmusikk skjer ofte på farten eller under multitasking — du er raskere til å hoppe over sanger som ikke passer stemningen.
insights_nb.action: Prøv en fokusert spilleliste med høyt energinivå for å starte kveldsøktene.

insights_nb.observation: Imagine Dragons er artisten du skipper oftest — 64 % av gangene.
insights_nb.context: Taylor Swift og Ed Sheeran følger tett bak.

insights_nb.observation: Du lytter alltid Harry Styles ferdig — 0 % skip-rate over 28 avspillinger.
insights_nb.context: Det er ditt mest lojale lytteforhold.
